title: Orchestrator spec
description: Schema for specs/<id>.yaml. Specs are schema-validated, never regex-parsed (see CLAUDE.md). Approval lives in .orchestrator/approvals/, runtime state in .orchestrator/state/ — a spec carries NO status/branch/attempt fields.

id.description: Stable id, e.g. SPEC-001. Must match the filename stem.

in_scope.description: Explicit path globs; new files allowed only under these.

regression_command.description: OPTIONAL regression-proof gate (holistic-review #1). An explicit, human-authored command that must FAIL against the base (with regression_test_paths overlaid) and PASS against the candidate — proving the change's new test actually catches the intended defect, not a vacuous pass. Never auto-inferred. Requires regression_test_paths.

regression_test_paths.description: Paths (files the regression_command needs — the new/changed tests + helpers, NOT the production fix) checked out from the candidate onto the base worktree, so the base run fails for the right reason rather than a missing file.

hard_ceiling_hours.description: Wall-clock ceiling (D10, default-on). Explicit override only.

needs_network.description: Worker network stays off unless true (D11). NOTE: the dispatcher HARD-REFUSES true until the D5 endgame (residual risk 13-B) — see SETUP-REPORT.md.
